hero.arenaTitle: Can You Command Farm Machines with AI?
hero.arenaSubtitle: Describe your farm, let AI pick the best machine & evaluate your Engineer level

engineer.heroBadge: World's First Farm Machinery AI Certification
engineer.title: AI Farm Machinery Engineer Certification
engineer.subtitle: Not a driver anymore. An AI Farm Machinery Engineer. Master 8 skills, earn 5 certification levels, command machine fleets with AI.
engineer.whyTitle: Why Get AI Farm Machinery Engineer Certified?
engineer.whySubtitle: The global farm machinery industry is shifting from 'human driving machines' to 'human commanding AI machine fleets'
engineer.why1Desc: Upgrade from traditional operator to AI Engineer with 30-80% salary increase. New global professional standards are forming.
engineer.why2Desc: Certification level directly affects arena ranking — L5 Chief Engineer gets +20% combined performance. Win the 14-dimension PK before it starts.
engineer.why3Desc: L3+ unlocks platform dispatch: inspection services, expo demonstrations, brand endorsements. Monetize your professional skills.
engineer.skillsSubtitle: AI Core Capabilities (55%) + Traditional Operation (45%) = Complete AI Engineer Profile
engineer.skill1Desc: Autonomous driving path planning, prescription maps, AI parameter tuning, boundary mapping, variable rate programming
engineer.skill2Desc: AI intervention timing, remote takeover, abnormal condition handling, autonomous driving boundary awareness
engineer.skill3Desc: Formation planning, multi-task assignment, collision avoidance, remote fleet monitoring, efficiency maximization
engineer.skill4Desc: Yield map analysis, soil data interpretation, satellite NDVI, ROI calculation, operation report generation
engineer.skill5Desc: Speed control, coverage optimization, blockage reduction, turn efficiency, cutting width utilization
engineer.skill6Desc: Emergency response, protective operation, hazard avoidance, unmanned system regulations, carbon compliance
engineer.skill7Desc: Sensor data analysis, wear prediction, fault tree diagnosis, digital twin maintenance, AI failure prediction
engineer.skill8Desc: Fuel consumption control, carbon management, idle optimization, green operation mode, carbon credit management
engineer.certSubtitle: From AI Apprentice to Chief Engineer — each level has clear skill thresholds and arena bonuses
engineer.certL1Req: Complete 4 basic video modules + quiz ≥70, 8D overall ≥50
engineer.certL3Req: L2 + simulator ≥85 + practical + fleet test, 8D overall ≥80
engineer.certL4Req: L3 + data decision test + AI programming project + Arena Top5 ×3, 8D overall ≥90
engineer.certL5Req: L4 + Arena Top1 ×5 + technical paper + expert review, 8D overall ≥95
engineer.certL5Perks: Chief Badge|Global Certification|Instructor Qualification|Platform Revenue Share
engineer.processSubtitle: Four steps from zero to certified engineer
engineer.process1Desc: Watch machine-specific training videos (16 modules), covering 8 skill dimensions, with subtitles in 8 languages
engineer.process2Desc: Browser 3D simulation with real-time AI scoring, covering harvesters, tractors, foragers, and balers
engineer.process3Desc: 200-question bank, AI-generated with auto-grading: scenario-based MCQs, true/false, and case analysis
engineer.process4Desc: L3+ requires in-person practical assessment at field expos or partner sites, with human scoring + AI assistance
engineer.ctaSubtitle: Enter the AI Arena, describe your farm needs — AI will assess your engineer level and tell you which skills to improve.

about.title: About AgriTrade
about.subtitle: The bridge connecting global farm machinery markets
about.missionText: Making global used farm machinery trading more transparent, efficient, and secure. Through AI valuation, cross-border arbitrage analysis, and one-stop logistics services, we help buyers and sellers maximize value.
about.value1Desc: AI-powered accurate pricing eliminates information asymmetry
about.value4Desc: Discover arbitrage opportunities for mutual benefit
about.teamText: We are a team with deep expertise in the agricultural machinery industry and rich experience in international trade and technology development. Team members are from China, the US, Japan and beyond, dedicated to building the world's leading used farm machinery trading platform.

arbitrageCalculator.title: Cross-border Arbitrage Calculator
arbitrageCalculator.description: Calculate cross-border arbitrage opportunities for used farm machinery, considering shipping costs, tariffs, insurance, and other expenses to help you discover the best investment opportunities. Our smart calculator automatically retrieves product information from the database and provides detailed profit analysis and risk assessment.
arbitrageCalculator.howToUseTitle: How to Use the Arbitrage Calculator
arbitrageCalculator.step1: Select a product from the list
arbitrageCalculator.step2: Domestic and international market prices will be automatically filled
arbitrageCalculator.step3: Adjust shipping costs, tariffs, insurance, and other parameters for more accurate estimates
arbitrageCalculator.step4: Click "Calculate Arbitrage Opportunity" to view detailed profit analysis and risk assessment

arbitrageTop.title: Arbitrage Rankings
arbitrageTop.description: View rankings of farm machinery products with the highest arbitrage opportunities. Discover the best investment choices for cross-border trading. We calculate arbitrage scores based on China-international price differences, shipping costs, tariffs, and other factors to recommend the most valuable products.
arbitrageTop.noDataHint: Please try again later or check if international price data has been imported
arbitrageTop.loadError: Failed to load data, please refresh the page
arbitrageTop.explanation2: Scores consider price difference, profit margin, risk assessment and policy factors
arbitrageTop.explanation3: High opportunity: Profit margin >30%, manageable risk, strongly recommended
arbitrageTop.explanation4: Medium opportunity: Profit margin 15-30%, monitor risk, cautious investment
arbitrageTop.explanation5: Low opportunity: Profit margin <15% or higher risk, research recommended
arbitrageTop.priceTrendDesc: Showing domestic vs international price trends for {productName} to help you time your purchase.
arbitrageTop.note: Note: Rankings are based on latest international prices and real-time exchange rates. Calculations are for reference only. Please consider shipping, tariffs, insurance, and other costs in actual transactions.
